{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201740359682F22CEBD92070019A"}"},"total":1133},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7299309767900758821","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看，目前为止攻出场不多，但是给的东西都非常的实用好吧，作者文笔也很好，这个无限流，看的时候都会感觉到害怕。还有就是一天更的太少了吧，希望作者大大多更一点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699503992,"group_id":"7264408135182339134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"怎奈松风明月三千里，天不许归期。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyR6wOKwjBG+zvQwiRTE+Jawlo/m660HHRqCLQvXNnlg","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4795c3c146ec44cc8c7b62313260ef4f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531408&x-signature=OWa8AvDPBS9zYtY4OSmsWFTzJks%3D","user_id":"2758004505313991","user_name":"今天打酱油的很疯狂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2758004505313991","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7264408135182339134","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流丨双男主丨满级重生丨与诡异签订婚契的无限流满级玩家丨在无限流世界开店】
诡异视人类为食物，他视诡异为填充货架之物。
被称为“妖孽”的苏白倒在了无限噩梦游戏的最后一关。
再睁开眼睛，他已经回到了十年前，除了弱不禁风的身体之外一无所有……才怪。
至少还有一张当初为了活命与诡异之物签下的婚书跟着他一起回来了……还有，这家跟在他身后的店算是……聘礼？
444路末班车（完成）幸福小区（完成）

诡异复苏（完成）欢乐旅馆（完成）清柳市（完成）

,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7450539398065783614","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"人物设定立体其他配角人设也很完善，没有设定很单一的角色，存在都是合理，每个人都有自己故事，剧情紧凑没有无意义的感情戏也没有无意义的配角，每篇游戏有每篇游戏的突出点，感情是细水长流，很适合慢慢去看，看的真的很舒服"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734719674,"group_id":"7264408135182339134","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3650824074177755"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7264408135182339134","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"275"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":57287,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7327163934803264266","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，起码在番茄里面算不错了，催更催更！！
人设没崩，剧情流畅，人物不扁平，没有为坏而坏的，逻辑扣的上，而且诡异的故事也挺感人的，好喜欢这种类型的文，一大群诡陪着主角，支持主角，要是现实里面我也有类似这样的朋友就好了[快哭了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705989025,"group_id":"7264408135182339134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9ell7A9E74McsHjXU5zZraCfCYLe8fnYJE/38J5GVJQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3650824074177755","user_name":"喜欢青木香的于文月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3650824074177755","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7264408135182339134","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流丨双男主丨满级重生丨与诡异签订婚契的无限流满级玩家丨在无限流世界开店】
